tasks.title: Promoter approval transition policy helper (service-only)
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: add internal registrar service transition-policy helper for promoter approval lifecycle (`submitted -> approved|rejected`) with explicit guard semantics and targeted service tests. No public route/schema/UI changes in this slice. Keep canon/spec-first and no feature drift.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- registrar.service.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- registrar.service.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
